action_set_definitions.name: get_batch_metadata
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the initial details of a batch, including processing facility, timestamp, and the total expected yield/quantity.

batch_id.description: The unique ID of the batch (e.g., 'BCH-TOM-101').

action_set_definitions.name: inspect_facility_sanitation
action_set_definitions.description: Queries processing logs for a specific facility to determine if sanitation standards were met and identifies the required 'Bracketing' time window if a failure is found.

facility_id.description: The ID of the processing facility.

target_timestamp.description: The timestamp of the contaminated batch to center the search.

action_set_definitions.name: trace_product_lineage
action_set_definitions.description: Maps ingredient batches to downstream derived products and the specific facilities (e.g., FC-NORTH-01) where they were processed or stored.

action_set_definitions.name: get_unit_distribution_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves real-time logistics data for all units associated with specific batches, including current location, delivery status, and quantity per shipment.

batch_ids.description: The IDs of batches to track.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_safety_intervention
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a safety action on a unit and sets its terminal status. For 'Ghost Delivery' risks (Out-for-Delivery or Delivered), Omnichannel notifications must be used.

intervention_type.description: The method used to secure the unit.

action_set_definitions.name: check_reconciliation_compliance
action_set_definitions.description: Aggregates terminal status data to verify if the total reconciled quantity matches the target yield.

target_quantity.description: The total units expected to be reconciled (e.g., 750).

state_description.entities: A registry of all participants in the supply chain (Suppliers, Processing Plants, Distributors, Retailers).
state_description.batches: Detailed records of food batches, including their product type, current status (e.g., 'active', 'recalled'), and creation timestamp.
state_description.lineage: A list of directed relationships mapping input ingredients/batches to output products (Provenance).
state_description.logistics_logs: Chronological records of batch movements between entities, including timestamps and quantities.
state_description.inspection_records: Quality control and safety test results associated with specific batches or facilities.

FACILITY-FC-NORTH-01-LOG.shift_1_to_2_transition: Omitted - Continuous run to meet volume
